top_signals.title: Gold Extends Gains as Dip-Buyers Shrug Off US-Iran Escalation
top_signals.summary: Gold extended gains as dip-buyers supported prices despite escalating tensions in the Middle East keeping the market under pressure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Erratic weather persists across Europe, fueling fires in Spain and France and hail in the Balkans
top_signals.summary: Europe is the fastest-warming continent and scientists say climate change is increasing the intensity of heat waves, droughts and wildfires, while also creating destructive storms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kubota to use H2O-from-air technology to supply water-stressed suburbs
top_signals.summary: The climate-driven water crisis is becoming a housing crisis as builders increasingly face challenges in securing sufficient water supplies for new residential developments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
